meaning: adj.仰卧的,掌心向上的,懒散的,向后靠的
examples: Although recent censure of corporate boards of directors as "passive" and "supine" may be excessive, those who criticize board performance have plenty of substantive ammunition.
I lay supine on the poolside grass.
The apparently sublime power of the volcano was largely the result of an initially supine reaction.
Even the supine French court sensed that something nasty was happening in Paris in the 1780s.
